projects.title: astrofish
projects.tagline: GGJ 2025 game jam submission: a fish trying to reach space.

mechanics.subtitle: moving platform
mechanics.description: a moving platform that oscillates horizontally, providing a dynamic element to the level design.

mechanics.subtitle: fish shooter
mechanics.description: shooting mechanic for the fish character, allowing them to fire water shots at enemies.

mechanics.subtitle: Systemic Loot & Probability Engine
mechanics.description: A designer-centric loot system that uses weighted probability to handle item drops upon entity destruction.

mechanics.subtitle: Game State Manager
mechanics.description: A centralized manager utilizing the Singleton design pattern to govern high-level game states and persistent UI logic across scene transitions.

mechanics.subtitle: Player Health & Attribute Controller
mechanics.description: A performance-optimized health system featuring passive regeneration logic, conditional 'God Mode' overrides, and efficient UI synchronization.

projects.title: Real-Time Productivity Suite
projects.tagline: Cloud-synced task and grocery management with offline-first persistence
projects.description: A high-performance productivity application built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. The system leverages Firebase for instant multi-device synchronization, ensuring grocery lists and task updates are propagated in real-time. Engineered with a mobile-first philosophy, it provides a seamless utility experience across web and handheld platforms, focusing on state management and reactive data flow.

mechanics.subtitle: Intelligent Category Filtering
mechanics.description: A performant filtering system that derives unique categories (e.g., 'Groceries', 'Work') directly from the task dataset. It uses memoization to prevent redundant recalculations during list updates and leverages Set-based aggregation to ensure a clean UI free of duplicate tags.

mechanics.subtitle: Dynamic List Routing & View Resolution
mechanics.description: Implements a routing-driven architecture to handle multiple task lists. It dynamically resolves list data via URL parameters and features a circular navigation system for quick switching between different categories or user-defined lists without terminal navigation breaks.

mechanics.subtitle: Firebase Cloud-State Synchronization
mechanics.description: Integrates Firebase Firestore to provide live data updates. This ensures that a grocery list modified on a desktop is updated instantly on a mobile device at the store. The implementation includes cleanup listeners to prevent memory leaks during real-time data streaming.

mechanics.subtitle: Adaptive Utility Layout
mechanics.description: A mobile-first UI designed for rapid data entry. The layout utilizes Tailwind CSS breakpoints to shift from a single-column mobile list to a multi-column dashboard on larger screens, optimizing the workspace for complex task management.
mechanics.code: {tasks.map(task => ( ))}

mechanics.subtitle: Component Memoization & Render Control
mechanics.description: Optimizes high-frequency UI updates (like checking off items) through selective memoization. By using React.memo, the application ensures that only the specific task item being toggled re-renders, maintaining 60FPS performance even with large datasets.
